purpose: Bounded provenance for the 31-resource context used to add the PostgreSQL-first LifeOS phase family. This is planning evidence, not a flat-file product authority.

merged_context.status: Exact source-title roster verified; full table remains a NotebookLM artifact until POSTGRES-003 defines its database-native owner.

architectural_result.interactive_control_path: LifeOS over local UDS with redb-backed low-latency views
architectural_result.flat_files: Derived projections after POSTGRES-010 authority cutover; current committed CSV remains canonical until that gate passes.
